completed_tasks.name: Lock-held manual-save transaction helper and no-network architecture guard
Backup-backed skills and commands replacement helpers
Backup-backed agents and MCP replacement helpers
Single-plugin atomic reinstall orchestrator core
completed_tasks.progress: Production implementation and focused tests are complete and committed. The code exports reinstallPlugin and ReinstallPlugin outcome types, uses withLockedStateTransaction, prepares all bridge handles before replacement, rolls back physical replacements on replacement/save failure, preserves installed version/installedAt, deletes plugin data only after success, emits warning-only cleanup/cache failures, and passes focused plus full npm check verification.

remaining_tasks.name: Create Plan 08-04 summary and close planning state
remaining_tasks.remaining: Write .planning/phases/08-atomic-reinstall-core/08-04-SUMMARY.md using the summary template, record commit dcd726c for implementation, include verification evidence, decisions, deviations, and self-check. Then update ROADMAP.md/REQUIREMENTS.md/STATE.md as appropriate for Phase 8 completion and commit docs if commit_docs remains true.

remaining_tasks.name: Phase 8 transition or verification gate
remaining_tasks.remaining: After 08-04 summary/docs are committed, Phase 8 has 4/4 plans complete. Next likely action is phase verification/review or transition into Phase 9 planning, depending on GSD workflow.

decisions.decision: Implement reinstall as a dedicated single-plugin core rather than uninstall+install or update wrapper.
decisions.rationale: Install rejects existing records, uninstall removes old resources first, and update imports Git/network refresh machinery plus weaker recovery semantics; Phase 8 requires cached-manifest, version-preserving, preserve-old-on-failure behavior.

decisions.decision: Use withLockedStateTransaction and explicit tx.save() inside reinstallPlugin.
decisions.rationale: The orchestrator must rollback already-swapped physical bridge resources if state persistence fails; withStateGuard auto-saves too late for that boundary.

decisions.decision: Return ReinstallPluginOutcome for all paths, including failed outcomes after notifyError.
decisions.rationale: Phase 9 needs deterministic batch partitions, while direct core usage still receives user-visible error notifications through notifyError.

decisions.decision: Expose test-only __deps seams for state transaction, completion cache drop, and data-dir removal.
decisions.rationale: Focused orchestrator tests need deterministic save/cache/data cleanup failure injection without adding production dependency complexity.

decisions.decision: Keep force semantics bridge-owned for agent foreign previous content.
decisions.rationale: replacePreparedAgents already constrains force to this plugin's previous index rows and rollback restores overwritten foreign/manual content on later failure.
